pushBell.encourage: Turn on notifications to stay updated when housemates add expenses, events, lists and tasks.
pushBell.hintDenied: Permission denied. Allow notifications for this site in your browser settings.
pushBell.hintFailed: Could not update. Check your connection or try from the installed app (PWA).

calendarFeed.title: Shared calendar
calendarFeed.subtitle: Events stay in sync with a subscription to this feed (not a one-off import).
calendarFeed.manualHint: If the button does not open your calendar app, copy the HTTPS link below and use “Add from URL / subscription” in your calendar settings.
calendarFeed.copyError: Could not copy. Select the field and copy manually.
calendarFeed.rotateConfirm: Regenerating invalidates old subscriptions (Google/Apple must be updated with the new URL). Continue?
calendarFeed.security: Do not share this link outside your household — anyone with it can subscribe to these events.

settings.title: Settings
settings.intro: Manage push categories. They apply to all homes you belong to. You never get a push for your own action.
settings.deviceBody: Enable notifications in the browser or installed PWA. The switches below only filter what you receive when others act in a home.
settings.vapidOn: To accept notifications on this device use the bell in the top bar. The options below only choose which types of alerts you receive when other members act.
settings.vapidOff: Push is not configured on the server (missing VAPID keys). Contact whoever runs the deployment.
settings.categoriesBody: Turn off categories you do not want as push. Changes apply to future events.

case.title: Sync your spaces
case.intro: Create a new home or join with a code a roommate shared.
case.empty: You are not in any home yet. Create one or join with an invite code.

EXPENSES.label: Expenses
EXPENSES.desc: New expenses and removals in the house ledger.

CALENDAR.label: Calendar
CALENDAR.desc: Events added or removed from the shared calendar.

LISTS.label: Shopping lists
LISTS.desc: New lists and items added to shopping lists.

HOUSE.label: Home & members
HOUSE.desc: When someone joins a home (invite code or email).

calendarGrid.dayPanelHint: The selected day updates the date in the form
calendarGrid.dayPanelHintEnd: above. Review and remove events here.

calendarPage.feedUrlError: Could not build the calendar link (unknown host). In production use a public domain or set
calendarPage.eventListEmpty: No events yet. Add the first one above.

casaHome.intro: Summary of expenses, balances, calendar, lists and tasks. Use the menu above for full sections.
casaHome.balancesHint: Positive = you paid more than your share; negative = you still need to catch up.
casaHome.settlementHint: Fewest transfers between housemates; details and recording under Expenses.
casaHome.balanced: Balances are even: no transfer needed.

expensesPage.balancesTransfersHint: Recorded transfers update the balance (they are not shared expenses).
expensesPage.balanced: Balances are even: no transfer needed.
expensesPage.registerTransfersHint: Record each movement under “Transfer between housemates” below so balances update.
expensesPage.ledgerEmpty: No expenses yet. Add one on the left.
expensesPage.settleHowBody: Based on current balances, this is a sequence with the fewest possible transfers to bring everyone toward zero: with n people with non-zero balance you need at most n − 1 movements.
expensesPage.settleHowHint: Positive balance = paid more than their share and should receive; negative = still owes. Each row is who should send money to whom.
expensesPage.transferSectionHint: Record a bank transfer or cash from one person to another to settle up, without creating a shared expense.

settlement.balancedBody: No extra transfers are needed to settle accounts for recorded expenses and transfers.
settlement.moreOne: + one more step on the Expenses page
settlement.moreMany: + {{n}} more steps on the Expenses page
settlement.registerHint: Record each movement under “Transfer between housemates” below: balances update and the plan recalculates.

forms.createHouseIntro: You will become the admin and get an invite code to share with housemates.
forms.joinIntro: Ask whoever created the home on the portal for the code.

tasksPage.empty: No tasks yet. Add one to organize chores.

listsPage.title: Shopping lists
listsPage.empty: No lists yet. Create one to share groceries.

membersPage.title: Member management
membersPage.intro: The owner manages transferring the role. Supervisors can invite and remove standard members. Invites and ownership transfer use email.
membersPage.inviteHint: Send an invite link valid 7 days. The person must sign in with the same email.
membersPage.transferHint: Choose a member already in the home. They will get an email to accept or decline. Until they accept, you stay the admin.
membersPage.msgTransferSent: Request sent: the recipient will get a confirmation email.
